abilities.name: healer
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.effect: Friendly Pokémon next to this Pokémon in double and triple battles each have a 30% chance of being cured of any major status ailment after each turn.
abilities.flavorText: Sometimes cures the status conditions of the Pokémon's allies.

abilities.name: aroma-veil
abilities.shortEffect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
abilities.effect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
abilities.flavorText: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from effects that prevent the use of moves.
